subject: fix(mobile): make burger menu scrollable on short viewports
body:
The nav had overflow-hidden which would clip content if the menu
(7 items + theme toggle + 8 theme options) exceeded viewport height.
Changed to overflow-y-auto with max-h-[calc(100dvh-4rem)] so the
entire menu scrolls when needed. Prevents themes from being hidden
on small screens.

Tags: ui, mobile, menu, accessibility
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: patch
